title: Implement minimal greenfield Site filesystem creation
implemented: Allowed non-dry-run narada sites create for valid greenfield create-site configs.
Materialized a minimal Site skeleton under site.site_root.
Refused collisions, source Site state imports, live runtime setup, and implicit capability grants.

verification.command: pnpm --dir packages\layers\cli exec vitest run test/commands/sites-create.test.ts

verification.summary: Built CLI created a temp minimal Site skeleton with 6 files, .narada/site.json, and .narada/admission/admission-ledger.jsonl.

rollback: Revert the task-0012 edits in packages/layers/cli/src/commands/sites.ts and packages/layers/cli/test/commands/sites-create.test.ts.
Remove task-0012 .narada task/audit/ledger evidence before publication if rejected.
No persistent Site root was created by verification; smoke roots were temporary and removed.
